Services / Recovery / SUD Services

Recovery / SUD Services

  • Full assessment for care needs
  • Medication-Assisted Treatment (MAT)
  • Individual & group counseling
  • Case management
  • Housing assistance
  • Transportation

Help is available for individuals experiencing substance use disorder (SUD).

If you or someone you care about is seeking treatment for SUD, we offer resources and support to help navigate the recovery process. Our specialists provide personalized, evidence-based care and work with each patient to identify the treatment options that best meet their needs.

Outpatient Care

Phone: (209) 940-5662 1031 Waterloo Rd, Stockton CA 95205 200 Cottage Ave #104, Manteca CA 95336 730 N. Central Ave, Tracy CA 95376 201 N. Stanislaus St #101, Stockton CA 95202

Residential Treatment

Phone: (209) 762-5000 201 N. Stanislaus St #102, Stockton CA 95202
